addUser: INSERT INTO users (user_name, user_email, user_password, user_phone, user_role, branch_id, is_active) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7) RETURNING *
updateUser: UPDATE users SET user_name = $1, user_email = $2, user_password = $3, user_phone = $4, user_role = $5, branch_id = $6, is_active = $7 WHERE user_id = $8 RETURNING *
deleteUser: UPDATE users SET is_active = false WHERE user_id = $1 RETURNING *
